ItacPersonItem.Notes: Gaddi created a circle of `literati` in his house, and was also associated to the Accademia della Virtu`. See Vanna Arrighi, `Gaddi, Giovanni`, and Paola Cosentino, `Martelli, Ludovico`, both in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
